# delegate

**Instance Property**

An object that provides behavior for the Safari view controller’s Done and Action buttons.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor weak var delegate: (any SFSafariViewControllerDelegate)? { get set }
```

## Discussion

Provide a [doc://com.apple.safariservices/documentation/SafariServices/SFSafariViewControllerDelegate] object to respond to the Done and Action buttons.

## Responding to View Controller Interaction

- **SFSafariViewControllerDelegate**: A protocol used to implement custom event handling for a Safari view controller.
